sheet_name: แบบขยายห้องน้ำ WC.1
view_title: รูปตัดห้องน้ำ WC.1 (1 และ 2)
grid_source: mk_test/t2/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า00_gridline.json

element.description: Cross-section through the shower/toilet wall of WC.1: shows wall tiling to 2.70 m with a decorative band, mirror (M.), LAV.2 basin, WC.1 toilet with PH./HS. accessories, and a shower zone with SW./K. fittings. Overall width dimension chain along the base: 0.45 / 0.70 / 0.40 / 0.40 / 0.40 m (partial totals 1.55 and 0.80 shown), overall 2.45 m.

Cross-section through the opposite (window) wall of WC.1: shows a double window opening (callout '3'), wall tiling to 2.70 m, mirror (M.), LAV.2 basin, WC.1 toilet, and towel rail (TR.). Overall width dimension chain: 0.10 / 0.90 / 0.90 / 0.10 m, overall 2.00 m (matching the gridB-gridC bathroom width).
Wall tile height bands consistently subdivided as 0.60 (base) / 0.20 / 0.20(approx) / 1.00 (upper) up to 2.70 m ceiling reference in both sections.

warnings: Sheet A-10 shows two 1:25 sections through the same WC.1 bathroom (from A-09's plan), viewed from perpendicular walls — combined into one file since both are the same room/detail rather than genuinely distinct floors/areas (matches round-1's approach of keeping this page as a single file).
Small tile-band sub-dimensions (~0.20 increments) are difficult to read precisely at this resolution; flagged for zoom review rather than stated as exact.
This detail is a continuation of the WC.1 room documented on หน้า11 (A-09).
